Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Benedikt Ahrens, Ralph Matthes

SubstitutionSystems

2015


************************************************************)


(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- Specification of an initial morphism of substitution systems from
  lambda calculus with explicit flattening to lambda calculus



************************************************************)

Set Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.BinSumOfSignatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.LamSignature.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.LiftingInitial.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MonadsFromSubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Lambda.

Context (C : category).

(** The category of endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .

Context (terminal : Terminal C)
        (CC : BinCoproducts C)
        (CP : BinProducts C).

Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).

Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CC.
Let EndEndC := [EndC, EndC].
Let CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC.




Let one : C :=  @TerminalObject C terminal.

Context (KanExt : ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
   RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C
     (U Z) C).


Let Lam_S : Signature _ _ _ := Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP.
Let LamE_S : Signature _ _ _ := LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP.

(* assume initial algebra for signature Lam *)

Context (Lam_Initial : Initial
     (@category_FunctorAlg [C, C] (Id_H C CC Lam_S))).

Let Lam := InitialObject Lam_Initial.




(** bracket for Lam from the initial hss obtained via theorem 15+ *)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
Initial (hss_category CC Lam_S)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
Initial (hss_category CC Lam_S)

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
∏ Z : Ptd,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C
  (U Z) C
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
Initial (FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
∏ Z : Ptd,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C
  (U Z) C
 apply KanExt.
  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
Initial (FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
 apply Lam_Initial.
Defined.
Let LamHSS := InitialObject LamHSS_Initial.

(** extract constructors *)



C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ functor_identity C, `Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ functor_identity C, `Lam ⟧

  exact (η (pr1 LamHSS)).
Defined.

(* we later prefer leaving App and Abs bundled in the definition of LamE_algebra_on_Lam *)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C]
⟦ H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam,
`Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C]
⟦ H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam,
`Lam ⟧

  exact (τ (pr1 LamHSS)).
Defined.


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ App_H C CP `Lam, `Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ App_H C CP `Lam, `Lam ⟧

  exact (BinCoproductIn1 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ _ _ _) · Lam_App_Abs).
Defined.


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  C C (U Z) C

LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ Abs_H C terminal CC `Lam, `Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ Abs_H C terminal CC `Lam, `Lam ⟧

  exact (BinCoproductIn2 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ _ _ _) · Lam_App_Abs).
Defined.




(** * Definition of a "model" of the flattening arity in pure lambda calculus *)

(** we need a flattening in order to get a model for LamE *)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ Flat_H C `Lam, `Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ Flat_H C `Lam, `Lam ⟧

  exact (prejoin_from_hetsubst (hetsubst_from_hss _ _ _ LamHSS)).
Defined.


(** now get a LamE-algebra *)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC LamE_S)

FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC LamE_S)

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat (Id_H C CC LamE_S)))) `Lam

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C]
⟦ constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
    (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `Lam, `Lam ⟧

 exact Lam_Var.

KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP) `Lam, `Lam ⟧
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `Lam, `Lam ⟧

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP) `Lam, `Lam ⟧
 apply Lam_App_Abs. (* do NOT destruct and reassemble more, use App_Abs directly *)
    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `Lam, `Lam ⟧
 apply Lam_Flatten.
Defined.


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CPEndC
     (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
        `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CPEndC
     (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
        `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten

  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Defined.


(** now define bracket operation for a given [Z] and [f] *)

(** preparations for typedness *)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Ptd
⟦ ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam ⟧

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
(λ α : ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S
         LamE_algebra_on_Lam
       ⟹ ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam,
 is_ptd_mor C α) ?pr1

terminal: Terminal C

CP: BinProducts C

 apply (nat_trans_id _ ).
    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
(λ α : ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S
         LamE_algebra_on_Lam
       ⟹ ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam,
 is_ptd_mor C α)
  (nat_trans_id
     (ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S
        LamE_algebra_on_Lam))
 abstract
        (intro c; rewrite id_right
         ; apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes_left_dir;
         apply idpath).
Defined.

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C

EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
(λ α : ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam
       ⟹ ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S
           LamE_algebra_on_Lam, is_ptd_mor C α)
  (nat_trans_id (ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam))
 abstract
        (intro c; rewrite id_right ;
         apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_dir;
         apply idpath) .
Defined.

(** this iso does nothing, but is needed to make the argument to [fbracket] below well-typed *)
(* maybe a better definition somewhere above could make this iso superfluous *)
(* maybe don't need iso, but only morphism *)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
iso
  (ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
iso
  (ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam)

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
∑
f : Ptd
    ⟦ ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S
        LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
    ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam ⟧, is_iso f

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
is_iso helper_to

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
is_z_isomorphism helper_to

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
is_inverse_in_precat helper_to helper_from

  abstract (
   split; [
    apply (invmap (eq_ptd_mor _ _));
    apply nat_trans_eq; [apply homset_property |] ;
    intro c ;
    apply id_left
                   |
    apply eq_ptd_mor_cat; (* idem *)
    apply (invmap (eq_ptd_mor _ _)) ;
    apply nat_trans_eq; [apply homset_property |];
    intro c ;
    apply id_left ]
           ).
Defined.



C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z,
ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S LamE_algebra_on_Lam
⟧
[C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z,
ptd_from_alg_functor CC LamE_S LamE_algebra_on_Lam
⟧
[C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

  exact (fbracket LamHSS (f · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)).
Defined.

(** Main lemma: our "model" for the flatten arity in pure lambda calculus is compatible with substitution *)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f
  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C

  C C (U Z) C

Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp: (λ h : [C, C, C]
       ⟦ U Z ∙ `(pr1 LamHSS) : [C, C, C],
       `(pr1 LamHSS) ⟧,
 bracket_property
   (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
      [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
      (θ_source Lam_S) 
      (θ_target Lam_S) 
      (theta Lam_S) Z) 
   (pr1 LamHSS)
   (f
    · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
   h)
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (pr2 LamHSS Z
           (f
            · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))))
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f
  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)

       (pr2 LamHSS Z
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)))
· # U
    (inv_from_iso
       bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper) =
η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z
· fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

· pr1
    (pr1
       (pr2 LamHSS Z
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)))
· # U
    (inv_from_iso
       bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper) =
η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z
· fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

    (* does not work:
       apply cancel_postcomposition.
       although the terms are of identical type:
    match goal with | [ |- _ · ?l = _ ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end.
(*
([C, C] hs
 ⟦ functor_composite (U Z) (functor_from_algebra_ob C hs CC Lam_S LamHSS)
   :[C, C] hs, LamHSS ⟧)
*)
    match goal with | [ |- _ = _ · ?l ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end.
(*
([C, C] hs
 ⟦ functor_composite (U Z) (functor_from_algebra_ob C hs CC Lam_S LamHSS)
   :[C, C] hs, LamHSS ⟧)
*)
*)

terminal: Terminal C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
∏ x : C,
(η (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  x =
(η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  x

    apply idpath.
    (* this proof did not work with pointedness but with brute force *)
  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S)
     (theta Lam_S) Z) (pr1 LamHSS)
  (f
   · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (pr2 LamHSS Z
           (f
            · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S) (theta LamE_S) Z
  `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
· # LamE_S (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)
· τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam =
τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z
· fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (pr2 LamHSS Z
             (f
              · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· pr1
    (pr1
       (pr2 LamHSS Z
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S) (theta LamE_S) Z
  `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
· # LamE_S (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)
· τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam =
τ LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z
· fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

    (* from here slightly interesting, because it is crucial to see that
       the τ considered here is a BinCoproduct arrow *)

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S) (theta LamE_S)
   Z `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
 · # LamE_S
     (fbracket LamHSS
        (f
         · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
 · BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten) c =
(BinCoproductArrow
   (CPEndC
      (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
         `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
   Lam_Flatten •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  c

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1 (pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1 (pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)) c)))
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam c)
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam c))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)
         ⊗ pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c
   · # (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C))
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)
         ⊗ pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c
   · # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CPEndC
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
          `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
    Lam_Flatten c =
(BinCoproductArrow
   (CPEndC
      (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
         `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
   Lam_Flatten •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  c

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
        (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
   · # (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c · Lam_App_Abs c)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C))
        (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
   · # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c · Lam_Flatten c) =
(BinCoproductArrow
   (CPEndC
      (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
         `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
   Lam_Flatten •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  c

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
(BinCoproductArrow
   (CPEndC
      (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
         `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
   Lam_Flatten •• U Z
 · fbracket LamHSS
     (f
      · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
  c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
        (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
   · # (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c · Lam_App_Abs c)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C))
        (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
   · # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
       (fbracket LamHSS
          (f
           · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
       c · Lam_Flatten c)


    (* showing that a diagram of coproduct arrows splits into two is slightly cumbersome,
       but a general theorem seems difficult to formulate

       instead we apply [BinCoproductArrowUnique] and then use the coproduct beta laws in
       each branch; this gives precisely what we want *)

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten •• U Z
   · fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
     (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
· # (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_App_Abs c
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Hyp2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
  (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `(pr1 LamHSS)
· # Lam_S
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =
τ (pr1 LamHSS) •• U Z
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam 
        (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) 
           (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam) 
        (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten
   •• U Z
   · fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_Flatten c

    (fbracket LamHSS

        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
· τ (pr1 LamHSS) =

· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)

    (* There should be a more general hypothesis than 'Hyp' defined above,
       one where one has a quantification over maps 'f', no? *)

Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten •• U Z
   · fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_Flatten c

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten •• U Z) c
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_Flatten c

  C C (U Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)

Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

BinCoproductIn2
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow

        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten •• U Z) c
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c = ?b
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_Flatten c

· (BinCoproductArrow

           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
     Lam_Flatten •• U Z) c = ?f'
 apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
Lam_Flatten (pr1 (U Z : C ⟶ C) c)
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · Lam_Flatten c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (U Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


    (* from here on 'simpl' is feasible
       after some opacification, at least *)

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)

  C C (U Z) C

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
X:= f · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam ⟧
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (U Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
X:= f · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg_functor CC Lam_S Lam ⟧
TT: ∏ f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamHSS ⟧,
fbracket LamHSS f =
((`LamHSS ∘ # U f)%subsys
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg LamHSS) ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· fbracket LamHSS
    (identity (ptd_from_alg LamHSS))
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (U Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS
    (f
     · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
    c =
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Flat_Sig C)) (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z))
  c
· # (pr1 (Flat_Sig C))
    (fbracket LamHSS
       (f
        · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper))
    c · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
X:= f · helper_to: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg Lam)
TT: ∏ f : ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)),
fbracket LamHSS f =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 f)%subsys
· fbracket LamHSS
    (identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)))
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) c =
identity (`Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (identity (pr1 `Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
   · # (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c))))
· (# (`Lam)
     (# (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to)) c))
   · pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to))
       (pr1 `Lam c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
X:= f · helper_to: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg Lam)
T3: fbracket LamHSS X =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 X)%subsys
· fbracket LamHSS
    (identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)))
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) c =
identity (`Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (identity (pr1 `Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
   · # (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c))))
· (# (`Lam)
     (# (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to)) c))
   · pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to))
       (pr1 `Lam c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 (f · helper_to))%subsys
· fbracket LamHSS
    (identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)))
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) c =
identity (`Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (identity (pr1 `Lam (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
   · # (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c))))
· (# (`Lam)
     (# (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to)) c))
   · pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to))
       (pr1 `Lam c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 (f · helper_to))%subsys
· fbracket LamHSS
    (identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)))
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to) c =
# (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (# (`Lam)
     (# (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to)) c))
   · pr1 (fbracket LamHSS (f · helper_to))
       (pr1 `Lam c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 (f · helper_to))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (# (`Lam) (# (pr1 Z) (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      (* written '\{{' and '\}}', respectively *)

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 (f · helper_to))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: Ptd
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 (pr2 Z) (`Lam (pr1 Z c)))
· (# (`Lam) (# (pr1 Z) (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS) ∘ pr1 (f · helper_to))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: Ptd
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 (pr1 (Z,, e)) c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `Lam)
  (pr1 (pr2 (Z,, e)) (`Lam (pr1 (Z,, e) c)))
· (# (`Lam)
     (# (pr1 (Z,, e)) (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `Lam) (pr1 e (`Lam (Z c)))
· (# (`Lam) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· (# (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


      (* now we want to rewrite with T3 in 3 places *)

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
((`(pr1 LamHSS)
  ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
 · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄) c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· (# (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· (# (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C

· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob

· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c) =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· (# (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
