  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
 apply T3'. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c) =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· (# (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
   · pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

(*
    apply cancel_postcomposition. (* that's a bad idea, because it fucks up use of third monad law and
                                      leads to something that is generally false *)
 *)
      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c = ?b
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
?b =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T) (# Z (pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob

 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys

              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z

  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)

 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys

· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
?t1 = pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c
 apply pathsinv0, T3'.

T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  C C (pr1 Z) C

Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  C C (pr1 Z) C

Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 T c) =
((`(pr1 LamHSS)
  ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
 · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄)
  (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C

     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob

     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 T c) =

  (f (pr1 T c) · identity (`Lam (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

terminal: Terminal C

  C C (pr1 Z) C

        (Id_H C CC

              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob

?b =

· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c) = ?f'
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
pr1 ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 `T c) = ?t2
 exact T3'. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
T3': ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
       (pr1 T c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

     [C, C] [C, C]

Z: C ⟶ C

  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C

(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)

· # (`T)

          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
       (pr1 T c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

terminal: Terminal C

     (algebra_disp_cat

              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: ptd_mor C (Z,, e)
  (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
c: C
T3: ⦃ f · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =

          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
       (pr1 T c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: (Z,, e) ⟹ ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam
fptdmor: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp (f,, fptdmor)
     (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
    ((f,, fptdmor) c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          ((f,, fptdmor) c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) ((f,, fptdmor) (pr1 T c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
       (pr1 T c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
fptdmor: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 `T) (pr1 e (`T (Z c)))
· # (`T)
    (# Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
       (pr1 T c)) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob

· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =

  (pr1 e (`T (Z c))

       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))

        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))

T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c) =
# (pr1 T)
  (pr1 e (`T (Z c))
   · # Z
       (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
          (f c · identity (`Lam c))
        · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c))

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
fptdmor: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c) = 
?b

  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
fptdmor: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)

     [C, C] [C, C]

        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c))

        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]

     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
fptdmor: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
T3: ⦃ (f,, fptdmor) · helper_to ⦄ =
(`(pr1 LamHSS)
 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
?t1 =
pr1 e (`T (Z c))
· # Z
    (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
     · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
 apply (nat_trans_ax e).

 ∘ nat_trans_comp f (nat_trans_id `Lam))%subsys

   · e (`T c))
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c))

X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)

   · e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 T)
  (# (functor_identity_data C)
     (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
      · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
   · e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c =
# (pr1 T)
  (# (functor_data_constr C C (λ a : C, a)
        (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), f))
     (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
      · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
   · e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c

  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC

              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]

  (functor_identity C)

     [C, C] [C, C]

   · e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
   · e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
?b =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

  (Total.total_precategory

           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
e (`T c) · f (pr1 T c) = ?t2
 apply X. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: ptd_pt C (Z,, e) (pr1 T c) · f (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
  (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
      · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
          (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
      · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
          (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (μ_0 C CC Lam_S LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
      · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
          (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)

X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
      · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)

· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =

· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)

· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =

prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c


      (*
      change (pr1 ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c) with (prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c).
      (* does not do anything *)
*)

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
      · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
          (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c = ?b
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
?b =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =

  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))

          (pr1 T c)))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c = ?b

  C C (pr1 Z) C

  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC

Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
   · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
       (pr1 T c)) = ?t2
 apply assoc. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
   · ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
       (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]

     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)

     [C, C] [C, C]

· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =

# (pr1 T)

· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)

· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

terminal: Terminal C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C

Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
X': # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (# (pr1 T)
     (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
        (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c)) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C

CP: BinProducts C

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
η LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam) (pr1 T c)

        
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))) (pr1 T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) (pr1 T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `Lam)) (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) (pr1 T c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC (functor_identity C)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) `Lam
    (nat_trans_comp
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CC
          (functor_identity C)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS))))
       (alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C))
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC))) (pr1 LamHSS)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam
       (nat_trans_comp
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CC
             (functor_identity C)
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
                (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                   `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
                (functor_compose
                   (option_functor CC terminal)
                   `(pr1 LamHSS))))
          (alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C))
                (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                   (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
             (pr1 LamHSS))) Lam_Flatten) (pr1 T c)
 apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
X': # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (# (pr1 T)
     (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
        (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c)) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c) = identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
X': # (pr1 `LamHSS) (η LamHSS (pr1 T c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 T c) =
# (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c)
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (# (pr1 T)
     (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
        (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c)) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c) = identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (# (pr1 T)
     (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
        (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c)) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

     (algebra_disp_cat

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]

     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄

   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

     (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
        (pr1 T c))
   · (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
        (pr1 T c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c)) =
?b
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c) = identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
?b =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

        (Id_H C CC

              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

· (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c) = ?t2

     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c) = identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ (pr1 T c) =
?f'
 apply X. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
X: # (pr1 T)
  (ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
     (pr1 T c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄
    (pr1 T c) = identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· (identity (pr1 `LamHSS (pr1 T c))
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

terminal: Terminal C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

terminal: Terminal C

     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC

              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X: # (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS (pr1 Lam c) =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS (Z c)
· # (pr1 `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c = ?b

terminal: Terminal C

  (functor_identity C)

· # (pr1 `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
?b =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
