f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X: # (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (Z c)
· # (pr1 `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
?b =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X: # (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (Z c)
· # (pr1 `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
?f =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Z c)
· # (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
 apply X. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X: # (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (Z c)
· # (pr1 `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c))
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

terminal: Terminal C

one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
# (pr1 T)
  (# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS)) (f c · identity (`Lam c)))
· (# (pr1 T)
     (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c) =
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) (f c · identity (pr1 Lam c))
· (prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
   · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (pr1 Z) C

  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
# (pr1 T) (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X: ((`LamHSS ∘ μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)%subsys
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) ∙ `LamHSS,
 `LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS =
BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT `LamHSS
  `LamHSS `LamHSS
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS •• `LamHSS
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS
# (pr1 T) (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))

BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)

     [C, C] [C, C]

     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam

T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x

# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f

X: ((`LamHSS ∘ μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)%subsys
 :

 `LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS =
BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT `LamHSS
  `LamHSS `LamHSS
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS •• `LamHSS
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS
X': ∏ x : C,
(((`LamHSS ∘ μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)%subsys
  :
  [C, C] ⟦ (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) ∙ `LamHSS,
  `LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C] ⟧)
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x =
(BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT `LamHSS
   `LamHSS `LamHSS
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS •• `LamHSS
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x
# (pr1 T) (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X': ∏ x : C,
(((`LamHSS ∘ μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)%subsys
  :
  [C, C] ⟦ (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) ∙ `LamHSS,
  `LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS : [C, C, C] ⟧)
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x =
(BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT `LamHSS
   `LamHSS `LamHSS
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS •• `LamHSS
 · μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x
# (pr1 T) (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X': ∏ x : C,
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
  (pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x =
identity
  (`(pr1 LamHSS)
     (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) x)))
· pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)
    (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS) x)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x
# (pr1 T) (⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
X': ∏ x : C,
# (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS))
  (pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) x)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x =
identity
  (`(pr1 LamHSS)
     (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) x)))
· pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS)
    (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS) x)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x
identity
  (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) c)))
· pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS) c)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
identity
  (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) c)))
· pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS) c)
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS c =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 LamHSS)) ⦄ c
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [functor_precategory_data C C, [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : ptd_obj C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (pr1 Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (Total.total_precategory
     (algebra_disp_cat
        (Id_H C CC
           (H C C C CC 
              (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)))))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
LamHSS:= InitHSS C CC KanExt Lam_S Lam_Initial: hss CC Lam_S
Z: C ⟶ C
e: functor_identity_data C ⟹ Z
f: Z ⟹ `Lam
c: C
Tη:= ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam: ptd_obj C
T:= Lam: ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
     [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) x) ⟹ x
μ_2_nat: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (`LamHSS ∙ `LamHSS) f
· μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x' =
μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS x · # (pr1 `LamHSS) f
identity
  (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) (`(pr1 LamHSS) c)))
· pr1 (μ_2 C CC Lam_S LamHSS) (pr1 `(pr1 LamHSS) c) =
prejoin_from_hetsubst LamHSS (pr1 Lam c)
 apply id_left.
Qed.

(** * Uniqueness of the bracket operation *)
(** That is a consequence of uniqueness of that operation for a larger signature, namely
    for that of lambda calculus with flattening.
    We thus only have to extract the relevant parts, which is still a bit cumbersome.
*)


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    h : [C, C, C]
        ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
    bracket_property
      (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
         (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h,
t =
fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    h : [C, C, C]
        ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
        `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
    bracket_property
      (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
         (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h,
t =
fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: ∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
t =
fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: ∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
isPredicate
  (bracket_property
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
        (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f)
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: ∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
pr1 t =
pr1
  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
   bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: ∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
isPredicate
  (bracket_property
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
        (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f)
 intro; apply (isaset_nat_trans (homset_property C)).
  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h

  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
   bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Ht: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f t
t = fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f

    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f t
t =
⦃ f · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper
⦄

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  C C (U Z) C

LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f t
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z)
  LamHSS
  (f · bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_helper)
  t

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
H1: # U f = η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t
c: C
HT: # U f c = (η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c
f c · identity (`Lam c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · t c

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

c: C
HT: # U f c = (η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c
(η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
H1: # U f = η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t
c: C
HT: # U f c = (η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `Lam)) (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC (functor_identity C)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) `Lam
    (nat_trans_comp
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CC
          (functor_identity C)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS))))
       (alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C))
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC))) (pr1 LamHSS)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam
       (nat_trans_comp
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CC
             (functor_identity C)
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
                (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                   `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
                (functor_compose
                   (option_functor CC terminal)
                   `(pr1 LamHSS))))
          (alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C))
                (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                   (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
             (pr1 LamHSS))) Lam_Flatten)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · t c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · t c

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
H1: # U f = η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t
c: C
HT: # U f c = (η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `Lam)) (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC (functor_identity C)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) `Lam
    (nat_trans_comp
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CC
          (functor_identity C)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS))))
       (alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C))
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC))) (pr1 LamHSS)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam
       (nat_trans_comp
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CC
             (functor_identity C)
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
                (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                   `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
                (functor_compose
                   (option_functor CC terminal)
                   `(pr1 LamHSS))))
          (alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C))
                (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                   (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
             (pr1 LamHSS))) Lam_Flatten)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · t c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · t c

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
H1: # U f = η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t
c: C
HT: # U f c = (η LamE_algebra_on_Lam •• U Z · t) c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `Lam)) (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC (functor_identity C)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam)) `Lam
    (nat_trans_comp
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CC
          (functor_identity C)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS))))
       (alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C))
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC))) (pr1 LamHSS)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans C C CC
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
          (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `Lam `Lam)
          (functor_compose
             (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))
       (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam
       (nat_trans_comp
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CC
             (functor_identity C)
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
                (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP
                   `(pr1 LamHSS) `(pr1 LamHSS))
                (functor_compose
                   (option_functor CC terminal)
                   `(pr1 LamHSS))))
          (alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C))
                (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                   (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
             (pr1 LamHSS))) Lam_Flatten)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors C C CP `(pr1 LamHSS)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        `(pr1 LamHSS))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
    
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C

  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
Ht: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f t
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
  `LamHSS · # Lam_S t · τ LamHSS = τ LamHSS •• U Z · t

CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
X: BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
     (θ_source LamE_S) 
     (θ_target LamE_S) 
     (theta LamE_S) Z `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
   · # LamE_S t
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC
          (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
             (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
          (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten)
    c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor

                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CPEndC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
           (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
        (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten
   •• U Z · t) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U

     Lam_Flatten •• U Z) c = (τ LamHSS •• U Z) c
 apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
   · # LamE_S t) c
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CPEndC
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
          `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
    Lam_Flatten c =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
   `LamHSS · # Lam_S t · τ LamHSS) c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z `LamE_algebra_on_Lam
   · # LamE_S t) c
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CPEndC
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
          `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
    Lam_Flatten c = ?b
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
?b =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
   [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source Lam_S) 
   (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z `LamHSS
 · # Lam_S t · τ LamHSS) c

 apply assoc.

one:= terminal: C

  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C

Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,

  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U

     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)

        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
    (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S) (theta LamE_S)

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CC
     (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c))
     (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
        (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor LamE_S U
                 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c)))
· nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
    (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S) (theta LamE_S)
    Z `LamE_algebra_on_Lam c = ?f'

                apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
     (pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)
      ⊗ pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))) c
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CC
       (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
          (pr1 (pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
           ∙ pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)) c)
       (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
          (pr1 (pr2 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z))
           ∙ pr1 (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam,, Z)) c))
· # LamE_S t c
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CPEndC
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
          `Lam) (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs
    Lam_Flatten c =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
   `LamHSS · # Lam_S t · τ LamHSS) c


      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
     (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CC
        (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
           (pr1 Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam) c)
        (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
           (pr1 Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam) c))
   · (# LamE_S t c
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CPEndC
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
             (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten
          c)) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
   `LamHSS · (# Lam_S t · τ LamHSS)) c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
     (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CC
        (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
           (pr1 Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam) c)
        (pr1 (Flat_Sig C)
           (pr1 Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam) c))
   · (# LamE_S t c
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CPEndC
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
             (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten
          c)) = ?b

terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
pr1
  (pr1 (pr2 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP))
     (`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⊗ Z)) c
· (# (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)) t c
   · (BinCoproductIn1
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
           (pr1 (Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP)
              `LamE_algebra_on_Lam)
           (pr1 (Flat_Sig C) `LamE_algebra_on_Lam)) c
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CPEndC
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
             (Flat_H C `Lam)) Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten
          c)) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source Lam_S) (θ_target Lam_S) (theta Lam_S) Z
   `LamHSS · (# Lam_S t · τ LamHSS)) c

      
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
BinSumOfSignatures.θ_ob_fun C C C CC (App_H C CP)
  (Abs_H C terminal CC) (App_θ C CP)
  (Abs_θ C terminal CC) `Lam Z c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ `Lam))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        (pr1 Z ∙ `Lam))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (functor_identity
              (functor_precategory_data C C))
           (functor_identity
              (functor_precategory_data C C)) `Lam)
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `Lam))
     (BinProduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ `Lam) `Lam t
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                `Lam)
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam)))
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
        (option_functor CC terminal) t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                `Lam)
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal) `Lam))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
           (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
        (`Lam ∙ `Lam) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
          (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten c)) =
BinSumOfSignatures.θ_ob_fun C C C CC (App_H C CP)
  (Abs_H C terminal CC) (App_θ C CP)
  (Abs_θ C terminal CC) `(pr1 LamHSS) Z c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ `(pr1 LamHSS)))
     (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
        (pr1 Z ∙ `(pr1 LamHSS)))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
        (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (functor_identity
              (functor_precategory_data C C))
           (functor_identity
              (functor_precategory_data C C))
           `(pr1 LamHSS))
        (functor_compose (option_functor CC terminal)
           `(pr1 LamHSS)))
     (BinProduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_identity
           (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ `(pr1 LamHSS)) `(pr1 LamHSS) t
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS))))
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
        (option_functor CC terminal) t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC
             (BinProduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinProducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                (functor_identity
                   (functor_precategory_data C C))
                `(pr1 LamHSS))
             (functor_compose
                (option_functor CC terminal)
                `(pr1 LamHSS)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CC
        (functor_identity C)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
           (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)
           `(pr1 LamHSS)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C))
             (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
                (Abs_H C terminal CC))) (pr1 LamHSS) c))
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
t: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam,
`LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CC
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
  (`Lam ∙ `Lam) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CC
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `Lam)
    (`Lam ∙ `Lam) `Lam Lam_App_Abs Lam_Flatten c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CC
  (functor_identity C)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
     (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC) `(pr1 LamHSS))
  c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C))
       (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC)))
    (pr1 LamHSS) c

      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
Qed.



C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
bracket_at C CC LamE_S
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : [C, C, C]
              ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
              `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
          bracket_property
            (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_source LamE_S)
               (θ_target LamE_S) 
               (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f
            h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C]
         ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
         `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source LamE_S) 
          (θ_target LamE_S) 
          (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
∑
h : [C, C, C]
    ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
    `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h
 
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f
  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)

    apply (bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f).
  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : [C, C, C]
              ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
              `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
          bracket_property
            (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
               (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f
            h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C]
         ⟦ U Z ∙ `LamE_algebra_on_Lam : [C, C, C],
         `LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
          (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f h,
 t = cntr)
  (fbracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f,,
   bracket_property_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam Z f)
 simpl; apply bracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_unique.
Defined.


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
bracket (theta LamE_S) LamE_algebra_on_Lam

terminal: Terminal C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source LamE_S) (θ_target LamE_S)
     (theta LamE_S) Z) LamE_algebra_on_Lam f

  
C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg LamE_algebra_on_Lam ⟧
bracket_at C CC
  (H C C C CC
     (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC))
     (Flat_H C))
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source
        (H C C C CC
           (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)) (Flat_H C)))
     (θ_target
        (H C C C CC
           (H C C C CC (App_H C CP)
              (Abs_H C terminal CC)) (Flat_H C)))
     (BinSumOfSignatures.θ C C C CC
        (H C C C CC (App_H C CP) (Abs_H C terminal CC))
        (Flat_H C)
        (BinSumOfSignatures.θ C C C CC (App_H C CP)
           (Abs_H C terminal CC) (App_θ C CP)
           (Abs_θ C terminal CC)) (Flat_θ C)) Z)
  LamE_algebra_on_Lam f

  apply bracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam_at.
Defined.


C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CC: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
one:= terminal: C
KanExt: ∏ Z : precategory_Ptd C,
RightKanExtension.GlobalRightKanExtensionExists
  C C (U Z) C
Lam_S:= Lam_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
LamE_S:= LamE_Sig C terminal CC CP: Signature C C C
Lam_Initial: Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))
Lam:= Lam_Initial: category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S)
LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
hss CC LamE_S

C: category
terminal: Terminal C

EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

LamHSS:= LamHSS_Initial: hss_category CC Lam_S
bracket (theta LamE_S) LamE_algebra_on_Lam

  exact bracket_for_LamE_algebra_on_Lam.
Defined.

(* assume initial algebra for signature LamE *)

Context (LamE_Initial : Initial
     (@category_FunctorAlg [C, C]
        (Id_H C CC LamE_S))).

C: category
terminal: Terminal C
CC: BinCoproducts C
CP: BinProducts C

  C C (U Z) C

  (category_FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC Lam_S))

  (category_FunctorAlg
     (Id_H C CC LamE_S))
Initial (FunctorAlg (Id_H C CC LamE_S))
 apply LamE_Initial.
Defined.
Let LamEHSS := InitialObject LamEHSS_Initial.

(** * Specification of a morphism from lambda calculus with flattening to pure lambda calculus *)

Definition FLATTEN : (hss_category CC LamE_S) ⟦LamEHSS, LamE_model_on_Lam⟧
  := InitialArrow _ _ .

End Lambda.
